entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology options designed to adapt agriculture to climate change and transition toward sustainability

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agricultural systems

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability to maintain agricultural productivity and environmental health over time

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC AND INSTITUTIONAL SUPPORT
entities.description: Factors including credit, extension services, and subsidies that influence farmer decisions

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: The country where the study on climate change adaptation was conducted

entities.name: MEOUANE
entities.description: One of the selected regions in Senegal's semi-arid zone

entities.name: THIEL
entities.description: One of the selected regions in Senegal's semi-arid zone

entities.name: DAGA BIRAME
entities.description: One of the selected regions in Senegal's semi-arid zone

entities.name: TWO-STAGE STRATIFIED SAMPLING METHOD
entities.description: A sampling technique used to select sample households for the study

entities.name: PURPOSIVE SAMPLING
entities.description: A non-probability sampling method used to select villages as clusters

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A primary crop grown in the study area of Senegal

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A primary crop grown in the study area of Senegal

entities.name: BLACK PEA
entities.description: A primary crop grown in the study area of Senegal

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animals raised as part of the main value chains in the study area

entities.name: DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS
entities.description: Statistical method used to analyze survey data

entities.name: LOGIT MODELS
entities.description: Statistical models used to analyze the impact of factors on the adoption of CST

entities.name: ANNUAL RAINFALL
entities.description: A climate indicator monitored by smallholder farmers

entities.name: SHORTENED CROP SEASONS
entities.description: A climate indicator resulting from climate change affecting crop growth periods

entities.name: RISING TEMPERATURES
entities.description: A climate indicator resulting from climate change

entities.name: SEASONAL RAINFALL DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: A negative climate impact characterized by insufficient rainfall during the season

entities.name: DELAYED START OF THE GROWING SEASON
entities.description: A negative climate impact where the planting season begins later than usual

entities.name: DRY SPELLS
entities.description: Periods of abnormally dry weather that affect crop and fodder yields

entities.name: GRAIN YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which is negatively impacted by climate variability

entities.name: FODDER YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of animal feed produced, which is negatively impacted by climate variability

entities.name: ACCESS TO CREDIT
entities.description: A socio-economic factor influencing the adoption of climate-smart technology

entities.name: EXTENSION SERVICES
entities.description: Institutional support providing technical knowledge and guidance to farmers

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL EXPERIENCE
entities.description: The level of experience farmers have in agricultural practices

entities.name: GOVERNMENT SUBSIDIES
entities.description: Financial support provided by the government to encourage agricultural adoption

entities.name: CLIMATE RISK
entities.description: The potential for negative agricultural impacts due to climate change

relationships.target: DELAYED START OF THE GROWING SEASON
